headline: Deno
description: Deno (Ryan Dahl, 2018, Node.js creator) is a secure JavaScript/TypeScript runtime built on Rust (Tokio) and V8. Native TypeScript support, security-first (no file/network access by default), built-in tooling (formatter, linter, test runner, bundler). Deno 2 (2024) added backward compatibility with Node.js/npm ecosystem.

citation.name: JavaScript Runtimes: Node.js, Deno, and Bun in 2025
citation.author: multiple
